---
title: "Anne Heissenbuttel"
subtitle: "Reed Biology Major"
# `profile.jpg` photo by Jan Tinneberg on https://unsplash.com
image: newnew.jpeg
image-alt: "Photo of a woman in a purple jacket"
about: # https://quarto.org/docs/websites/website-about.html
  template: trestles
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com
---


## Education

Reed College, Portland \| Oregon \| Sept 2023 - May 2027

School for Field Studies, Kenya \| Africa \| January 2025 - May 2025

University College Cork, Cork \| Ireland \| September 2025 - December 2025

## Experience

Maine Audubon \| Biological Intern \| May 2024 - August 2025

Maine Department of Inland Fisheries and Wildlife  \| Bat Monitoring Technician \| May 2026 - August 2026

School for Field Studies Kenya \| Research Assistant \| January 2025 - May 2025

## Publications 

"FireFinder" \| rStudio CRAN \| 2026

"Effectiveness of The Mbirikani Predator Compensation Fund in Mitigating Human Lion Conflict" \| Journal of \| 2027

"The Forecast? Loons Won’t Nest in Cloudy Waters" \| Maine Audubon \| 2024

"Loons on the move: A visit to the Southern Maine Children’s Water Festival" \| Maine Audubon \| 2025
